concerns.text: FR-011 (sensitivity analysis sweep {0.1, 1.0, 10.0}) and SC-010 (stability metric <10% relative range) are not explicitly covered. T027 mentions a 'sweep' but lacks the specific alpha values and the calculation of the relative range metric required to verify SC-010.

Plan 'Statistical Methodology' section mandates reporting Benjamini-Hochberg (FDR) adjusted p-values in addition to Bonferroni. Tasks T019 and T026 only explicitly mention Bonferroni correction logic, leaving the FDR implementation undefined.

Plan 'Dataset Verification' section mandates a hard gate pre-condition: 'pipeline verifies that the input dataset contains smiles, logS, and logP columns' and aborts if missing. T004 only checks for 'smiles' column and optionally logS/logP. No task explicitly implements the hard abort logic for missing logS/logP required by the plan's verification gate.

Plan 'Baseline & Confounding Control' requires implementing Baseline Model 2 (Size: MW + Atom Count) and Partial Correlation analysis. T025 mentions 'baseline models (Mean, MW-only)' but does not explicitly include 'Atom Count' in the size baseline or the 'Partial Correlation' calculation required by the plan.

Plan 'Baseline & Confounding Control' requires a 'Scientific Success Criterion' comparison: Entropy model must demonstrate lower RMSE/higher |r| than Size baseline. T026 mentions a 'comparison table' but does not explicitly task the implementation of the logic to evaluate and report this specific success criterion.
